svg.text: Enterprise Knowledge Research Agent — System Architecture
14-Agent Multi-Agent System | AV/OT Cybersecurity Domain | LangChain + ChromaDB + n8n + FastAPI
LAYER 2 — FASTAPI GATEWAY (Input Validation, Auth, Prompt Injection Filter)
Used by EvaluationAgent and ObservabilityAgent for drift detection
Per-agent trace, latency, cost, prompt/response capture
LAYER 6 — N8N WORKFLOWS (External Orchestration, External Tool Calling, Observability)
1. Webhook → 2. HMAC verify → 3. API key auth → 4. Rate limiter → 5. Prompt-injection filter
6. Query classifier (LLM) → 7. Parallel split → 8. RAG retrieve + 9. NVD CVE call + 10. CISA advisory call
11. Merge → 12. MITRE ATT&CK mapper → 13. Compliance mapper → 14. Synthesizer (LLM w/ tools)
15. LLM-as-judge evaluator → 16. Conditional router (PASS → respond, FAIL → human queue + audit)
HMAC + API key + rate limit + prompt-injection filter + output redaction + immutable audit + LangSmith trace push
Workflow 2 — Autonomous Threat Surveillance + Eval Drift Monitor (15 nodes)
1. Schedule trigger (4h) → 2. Load corpus deltas → 3. Security signal scanner → 4. NVD lookup → 5. CISA fetch
6. Severity classifier (LLM) → 7. ATT&CK for ICS mapper → 8. Gap detector → 9. Compliance impact
10. Eval-drift monitor (golden dataset re-score) → 11. Alert router → 12. Email/Slack (CRITICAL)
13. Audit log writer → 14. Observability metrics push → 15. Archive node
Scheduled scan + signed alerts + SIEM-ready audit + drift baseline lock + secrets via n8n credentials, never inline
Lamonte Smith · Interview Kickstart · Applied Agentic AI · Week 8 · Milford, MI · 2026
